response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong web and full-stack engineer with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the core requirement of this role is substantial C++ development — his C++ experience is limited to a 6-month contract at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis project. There is no evidence of multi-threaded systems programming, industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443/SDL), MQTT or industrial protocol experience, or the embedded/IoT background the role demands. His profile is fundamentally misaligned with the role's primary technical axis.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with event-driven and micro-services architectures handling high throughput (Sociomantic, GISCollective)
Node.js and React experience aligns with the role's advantageous skills
Long career showing adaptability across domains (embedded, web, mobile, data integration) and agile/TDD practices
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months in 2014–2015) and far below the depth required for senior-level systems architecture in C++
No evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL), IEC 62443, or any industrial cybersecurity knowledge
No IoT, industrial automation, or industrial protocol experience (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, etc.)

key_factors.factor: No industrial security or IEC 62443 knowledge
